description: A Drupal paragraph media-box block that combines an optional heading, a media item (image or video embed), and optional body text content.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Media box with image and no title or body

stories.name: WithTitle
stories.description: Media box with a title heading above the media item

stories.name: WithTitleAndBody
stories.description: Media box with title, video embed, and descriptive body paragraphs

props.title: Amanda Jones
props.children: Amanda has the rare disease Tracheobronchomalacia. She works hard advocating for disability in a variety of ways.

stories.name: WithBodyOnly
stories.description: Media box with image and body text but no title

props.children: Mona Siddiqui in conversation with Professor Henk de Burg

notes: Root element always carries all four classes: uosblock, paragraph, paragraph--type--para-media-box, and paragraph--view-mode--default. The media field is always wrapped in a div with Drupal field classes: field field-paragraph--field-mb-media-item field-name-field-mb-media-item field-type-entity-reference field-label-hidden, then div.field-items. The title h3 uses class field-mb-title when present. Media content (image picture element or video-embed-field-lazy div) and body paragraphs are highly variable — modelled as ReactNode props. The selector is scoped to .node--type-hub and .node--type-landing but the component itself is a paragraph type usable across page types.
